method: RMT (Marchenko-Pastur) eigen-clean + eigenportfolio factor regression + OU/AR(1) s-score residual mean-reversion (Avellaneda-Lee 2010, factor-residual)
libs_implemented: numpy: Marchenko-Pastur upper-edge eigen-clean of correlation matrix; eigenportfolio (1/vol-weighted eigenvectors) factor returns; per-name OLS factor regression -> idiosyncratic residual; discrete OU/AR(1) fit -> s-score.
universe: BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, DOGE, LTC, LINK, AVAX, DOT, ATOM, UNI, ETC, BCH, FIL, TRX, NEAR, AAVE, XLM, ALGO, SAND, MANA, AXS, FTM, THETA, EGLD, VET
note: RMT-OU residual mean-reversion dies OOS: Sharpe=0.05, PSR=0.52, DSR=0.02 (SR*=0.084); overlay no help (0.32->0.29). RMT eigen-factors do not rescue stat-arb where cointegration pairs already failed.

governance.no_lookahead: s-score from returns in (t-W, t-1]; weights shifted 1 bar.
governance.chronological_oos: all knobs scanned on first 60%; last 40% reported.
governance.deflate: 432 variants in grid; within-family DSR SR*=0.0838.
governance.maxdd: close-to-close market-neutral maxDD flagged as illusion.
